summary: Stamp Ledger feature E2E testing completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional - list/filters/detail modal/revoke modal/CSV export working correctly.

minor.issue: Fixed: /stamps/export.csv was routing to /stamps/{stamp_id} due to FastAPI path matching order
Fixed: Added /api/stamps to CSRF_EXEMPT_PATHS for JWT-authenticated stamp operations

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

critical_code_review_comments: STAMP_ISSUED audit events are not logged for older stamps - new stamps should have events (verify stamping_service.py logs events on stamp creation)
STAMP_REVOKED event logging is working correctly with metadata (reason)
CSV export properly handles status filters and date ranges
Pagination working correctly (25 items per page)
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Moved /stamps/export.csv route before /stamps/{stamp_id} and added /api/stamps to CSRF_EXEMPT_PATHS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stamp Ledger feature is fully implemented. APIs: GET /api/stamps (paginated list with status/search/date filters), GET /api/stamps/{stamp_id} (detail with verification_url), POST /api/stamps/{stamp_id}/revoke (with reason, logs STAMP_REVOKED event), GET /api/stamps/{stamp_id}/events (audit trail), GET /api/stamps/export.csv (CSV download). Frontend at /stamp-ledger route.

features_verified.POST /api/stamps/{stamp_id}/revoke - rev: PASS - Changes status, logs audit event

features_verified.Frontend - Stamps table: PASS - Displays stamp data with actions
features_verified.Frontend - Detail modal: PASS - Shows full stamp details, verification URL, revoke button
